steps.title: Identify all three sides of the triangle
steps.content:
The triangle has:
  • One side with length $x$ inches
  • Two sides each with length $y$ inches
All three sides together are: $x$, $y$, and $y$.

steps.title: Write the perimeter equation
steps.content:
The perimeter is the sum of all three sides: $$x + y + y$$
Combine like terms: $$x + 2y$$
Since the perimeter is 47 inches: $$x + 2y = 47$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
